basic_details.job_title: ECIL Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 21 Project Engineer, Technical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Electronics Corporation of India Limited (ECIL), ECIL Post, Hyderabad – 500062, Telangana
basic_details.post_name: Project Engineer on Contract (PE-C), Technical Officer on Contract (TO-C), Assistant Project Engineer on Contract (APE-C), Senior Artisan on Contract (SA-C)
basic_details.short_information: ECIL is recruiting 21 contract posts across four post categories (PE-C, TO-C, APE-C, SA-C) with B.E./B.Tech / Diploma / ITI qualification and 1 to 3 years of post-qualification experience, through Walk-in Selection from 15-06-2026 to 19-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Purely Temporary / Contract basis – Initial 1 year, extendable up to 4 years
age_limit.details: Cut-off date for age calculation is the date of selection (respective walk-in date for each zone).

qualification.details: * Apprenticeship in the relevant field (maximum of one year) is also counted as experience. Experience from Academic Institutions / Colleges / Internship / Project work will NOT be considered for post-qualification experience calculation. | All qualifications must be from a recognized Indian University/Institution recognized by the appropriate Statutory Authority. CGPA to percentage conversion certificate from the institution/university is mandatory if the institution follows a grade evaluation system.

salary_details.assistant project engineer on contract (: Rs. 26,208/month# (revised every 6 months as per CLC Central guidelines)
salary_details.senior artisan on contract (sa-c): Rs. 24,018/month# (revised every 6 months as per CLC Central guidelines)

selection_process: A. Qualification 20% of aggregate percentage in B.E./B.Tech./Diploma/ITI
B. Relevant Experience – PE-C 30 marks (15 marks for initial 3 years; 5 marks for each additional year, max 30 marks)
B. Relevant Experience – TO-C & APE-C 30 marks (10 marks for initial 1 year; 10 marks for each additional year, max 30 marks)
B. Relevant Experience – SA-C 30 marks (15 marks for initial 2 years; 5 marks for each additional year, max 30 marks)

Selection is through Walk-in mode. Candidates will be evaluated through Document Verification followed by Personal Interview. Final recommendations will be made on merit based on the following criteria:
Candidates will be allowed to register only after successful document verification. Candidates must report at the respective zonal venue with their duly filled application form
and one set of self-attested photocopies. Registration is strictly between 09:00 hrs and 11:30 hrs; late arrivals will not be entertained.
how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in Selection. There is no online application submission. Candidates must appear in person at the respective zonal venue on the designated walk-in date. The application form must be downloaded from the official ECIL website (www.ecil.co.in) and filled before attending.
Documents to carry (Originals + one set of self-attested photocopies):
Duly filled Application Form (downloaded from www.ecil.co.in) and Resume
10th Class Certificate or School Leaving Certificate (as Date of Birth proof)
Qualification documents — Certificate and Marks Sheets of B.E./B.Tech./Diploma/ITI as applicable
CGPA to percentage conversion certificate from institution/university (mandatory if grade system used)
Experience Certificates from previous employers clearly mentioning duration (from & to dates) and post held
If currently employed: Appointment Order + first and recent pay slips (mandatory)
Category Certificate — EWS/OBC/SC/ST as applicable; OBC certificate must not be older than 1 year from date of selection and must explicitly mention Non-Creamy Layer
PwBD certificate (if applicable, with minimum 40% disability); Discharge certificate (for Ex-Servicemen); J&K domicile certificate (if claiming age relaxation)
ECIL current employees: Permission letter from respective Head of Division (HoD)
For queries: Email [email protected] or call 040-27182222. Any corrigendum will be published only on www.ecil.co.in; do not rely on other websites or social media for updates.
important_instructions: This engagement is purely on temporary/contract basis for an initial period of 1 year, extendable up to 4 years. It does NOT create any right to regularization or permanent employment in ECIL. Candidates must apply for one category of post only. Applying for multiple posts is not allowed. Registration timing is strictly 09:00 hrs to 11:30 hrs at the respective venue. Candidates arriving after 11:30 hrs will NOT be allowed under any circumstances. Candidates must be ready to work anywhere in India as per organizational requirements. Experience from Academic Institutions / Colleges / Internship / Project work will NOT be considered for post-qualification experience. Only industry experience from registered organizations will be counted. Apprenticeship in the relevant field (maximum of one year) will be counted as experience. Qualifications through Distance/Correspondence/Off-campus mode are NOT eligible. OBC candidates must ensure their OBC-NCL certificate is not older than 1 year from the date of selection and explicitly mentions the Non-Creamy Layer clause. ECIL employees currently on rolls must obtain and produce a written permission letter from their Head of Division before attending. Canvassing in any form will result in immediate rejection of candidature. ECIL reserves the right to alter the number of posts or cancel the entire recruitment process without assigning any reason. Applications/candidatures are liable to rejection at any stage if suppression of facts or furnishing of false information is detected. Legal proceedings arising from this advertisement are subject to exclusive jurisdiction of Courts at GHMC (Kapra Circle) only. Beware of fraudulent elements promising contractual appointment through illegal gratification; selection will be done purely on merit in a transparent manner.

all_official_links.label: Download ECIL Walk-in Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What are the walk-in dates for ECIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in dates vary by zone: Kolkata (East Zone) on 15-06-2026; Hyderabad (HQ), Mumbai (West Zone), and New Delhi (North Zone) on 18-06-2026; and Chennai (South Zone) on 19-06-2026. Registration is between 09:00 hrs and 11:30 hrs at the respective venue.

faq.question: Q2. How many total posts are notified in ECIL Walk-in Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 22 posts are notified across four post categories — Project Engineer on Contract (PE-C), Technical Officer on Contract (TO-C), Assistant Project Engineer on Contract (APE-C), and Senior Artisan on Contract (SA-C) — spread across five zones (Hyderabad, Mumbai, Chennai, Kolkata, New Delhi).

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for ECIL PE-C (Project Engineer on Contract) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.E./B.Tech. degree with at least 60% aggregate marks in the relevant discipline, along with a minimum of 3 years of post-qualification experience (apprenticeship up to 1 year also counted). The upper age limit for UR category is 33 years as on the walk-in date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary / emoluments for ECIL Project Engineer on Contract (PE-C)?
faq.answer: PE-C receives Rs. 40,000/month in Year 1, Rs. 45,000/month in Year 2, Rs. 50,000/month in Year 3, and Rs. 55,000/month in Year 4. Additionally, a one-time lump sum attire allowance of Rs. 8,400/- is paid after completing at least 6 months of tenure.

faq.question: Q5. Is ECIL Walk-in Recruitment 2026 a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. This is purely a temporary/contract engagement for an initial period of 1 year, extendable up to 4 years (including the initial term) depending on project requirements and satisfactory performance. It does not create any right to regularization or permanent employment in ECIL.

faq.question: Q6. Can I apply for multiple posts in ECIL Walk-in Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates must apply for one category of post only. Applying to multiple posts is strictly not allowed.

faq.question: Q7. What documents must I carry to the ECIL walk-in?
faq.answer: You must carry the duly filled application form and resume, 10th certificate (DOB proof), qualification certificates and mark sheets, CGPA conversion certificate (if applicable), experience certificates (mentioning duration and post held), Appointment Order and recent pay slips (if currently employed), category certificate (EWS/OBC-NCL/SC/ST), and a government-issued photo identity proof — all in original along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection method for ECIL Walk-in Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on merit combining three criteria: Qualification (20% of aggregate percentage), Relevant Experience (maximum 30 marks — weightage varies by post), and Personal Interview (50 marks). Only candidates who clear document verification will be allowed to participate in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is internship or project work counted as experience for ECIL posts?
faq.answer: No. Experience from Academic Institutions, Colleges, Internships, or Project work is explicitly NOT considered for post-qualification experience calculation. Only industry experience from registered organizations and relevant apprenticeship (up to a maximum of 1 year) will be counted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I get updates and corrigendum for ECIL Walk-in Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All updates, corrigendum (if any), and official information will be published only on the official ECIL website www.ecil.co.in. Candidates must not rely on other websites, social media handles, or third-party publishers for any recruitment-related information.
